question_intent: Average shooting percentage for Eastern Conference players in the 1930s

plan.question_intent: Average shooting percentage for Eastern Conference players in the 1930s
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.g, leaf_1.a, leaf_1.gp, (leaf_1.g + leaf_1.a) / leaf_1.gp AS shooting_percentage
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g, s.a, s.gp
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 1939)) AS leaf_1

JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 2023)
LIMIT 5

FROM scoring AS s

JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 2023)

build_logs.notes: Average shooting percentage for Eastern Conference players in the 1930s

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g, s.a, s.gp
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 2023)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG((leaf_1.g + leaf_1.a) / leaf_1.gp)
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.g, s.a, s.gp
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC') AND (s.year >= 1930 AND s.year <= 2023)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (t.confid = 'EC')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average value of (goals plus assists) divided by games played, across all players in the Eastern Conference from 1930 through 2023?
